title: Can I change order of boards
excerpt:
Hi, new user here, but I’ve searched and can’t find the answer.  Can I change the order of boards within a folder? 
Each time I create a new board it pops up at the top, but actually I need them to add in order of import…

posts.author: Lisa_Confi (Lisa Crombie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, new user here, but I’ve searched and can’t find the answer. Can I change the order of boards within a folder?

Each time I create a new board it pops up at the top, but actually I need them to add in order of importance. Is this possible to move boards within the folder?

Thanks
Lisa

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Lisa_Confi

There’s not currently a way to re-arrange, via API, the order in which your boards appear in your account’s left pane.

Although if you login to the monday.com UI, you can manually rearrange them by clicking and dragging them

-Scott
